title: German Suet Dumplings
description: A hearty German dish featuring pan-fried dumplings filled with a creamy mixture of suet and herbs.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine suet, flour, milk, eggs, mellow, salt and Chinese parsley. Mix well to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place a dumpling wrapper in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the wrapper and press the edges together to seal.
Heat a large pan with oil over medium heat.
Add the dumplings to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Serve hot with your favorite sauce.
